title: Appo
content:
{{Top}} {{Update|[[Master of Evil]], [[Part V]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:AppoHead-COK.png]] |option1=20 BBY |image2=[[File:Appo.jpg]] |option2=Helmet |name=Appo
CC-1119 |homeworld=[[Kamino]]{{Databank|appo|Appo}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human]] {{C|[[Cloning|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[meter]]s (6 [[Foot|ft]]) |mass= |hair=[[Color|Black]]{{TCW|Carnage of Krell}} |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Tan |cyber=[[Cybernetics|Prosthetic right leg]]''[[Master of Evil]]'' |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic]] **[[501st Legion]]{{Film|III}} *[[Galactic Empire]] **[[Shadow Platoon]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I live to serve the Empire.''"
"''You live to serve ''me''.''"
"''Yes, my lord.|A quiet Appo speaks with Darth Vader|}} '''Appo''', whose [[clone trooper]] designation was '''CC-1119''', was a [[clone trooper officer]] who served as a [[Clone Sergeant]] and later as a [[Clone Commander]] in the [[501st Legion]] during the [[Clone Wars]]. As a [[soldier]] in [[Republic Military|military service]] to the [[Galactic Republic]], Appo was a veteran of several major battles fought between the [[Grand Army of the Republic]] and the [[Separatist Droid Army|droid armies]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] including [[Umbara]] at the height of the [[Galaxy|galactic]] conflict, and on the Republic [[capital]] [[Planet|world]] of [[Coruscant]] by the war's end. He was a loyal [[trooper]] who obeyed the orders of his [[commanding officer]], conditioned to render unquestioned allegiance to the Republic. As with all troopers in the Grand [[Army]], Appo was [[Cloning|cloned]] on the [[extragalactic]] world of [[Kamino]], where [[Kaminoan]] [[scientist]]s used the [[DNA|genetic]] [[Clone template|template]] of [[Jango Fett]], a [[human]] [[bounty hunter]], to create a clone army for the Republic. Before Appo's promotion to the [[military rank]] of [[commander]], he served as a [[sergeant]] in the 501st [[Legion]], led by [[Jedi General]] [[Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Clone Captain]] [[Rex]]. During the [[Battle of Umbara]], command of the 501st was temporarily transferred to another [[Jedi]] [[officer]], [[General]] [[Pong Krell]], as a result of Skywalker returning to Coruscant at the request of [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]]. Sergeant Appo witnessed firsthand Krell's willingness to sacrifice his [[troop]]s but nonetheless faithfully executed the general's orders until Krell's [[treason]]. In the final [[Standard day|days]] of the war, Chancellor Palpatine had put [[Order 66]] into effect, declaring that all Jedi were enemies of the Republic. As a result, Appo, serving as the commander of the force of the 501st active on Coruscant, accompanied the [[Sith Lord]] [[Darth]] Vader as the 501st participated in [[Operation: Knightfall]], invading the [[Jedi Order]]'s home on Coruscant as part of a [[Great Jedi Purge|systematic purge]] that occurred across [[the galaxy]]. He encountered [[Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa|Bail Organa]] during the attack, and used the threat of force to keep the [[Alderaanian]] [[Politics|politician]] at bay. But as Organa tried to leave, [[Padawan]] [[Zett Jukassa]] ambushed Appo's contingent. The young Jedi struck down the commander, wounding him in the [[Limb|lower leg]], and several troopers until Clone Lieutenant Bow [[Death|killed]] the Padawan. In the aftermath of Order 66 and the [[Proclamation of the New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire]], Appo retained his position as Commander of the 501st Legion and continued his military service in the [[Imperial Army|army]] of the new regime. Into the early weeks of the [[Imperial Era]], Appo, along with twenty other clone troopers, was handpicked by the newly christened Darth Vader to serve in an elite unit known as [[Shadow Platoon]]. ==Biography== ===Creation=== Appo, also known by the designation CC-1119,{{ForceCollection|Clone Commander Appo|star=5}} was one of many [[clone trooper]]s [[Cloning|grown]] from the [[DNA|genetic source]] of the [[bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett]].{{Databank|clone-troopers|Clone Troopers}} Bred on the [[extragalactic]] [[Planet|world]] of [[Kamino]],{{Databank|kamino|Kamino}} he was created to serve in an [[army]] of clone [[soldier]]s that had been developed in secret to become the [[Republic Military|armed forces]] of the [[Galactic Republic]]. Within ten [[Standard year|years]] of the clone army's inception,''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]'' the Republic went to war with the [[Separatist Crisis|secessionist movement]] known as the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. As a result, Appo became a soldier in the newly-formed [[Grand Army of the Republic]], serving in many critical battles across [[the galaxy]] during the [[Clone Wars]].{{HotToysCite|set=Television Masterpiece Series|packtype=Sixth Scale Figure|pack=#076: Commander Appo with BARC Speeder|link=collectibles/star-wars-commander-appo-with-barc-speeder-hot-toys-911126}} ===Battle of Umbara=== ====Securing the airbase==== {{Quote|The platoons are in the formation you've requested, General. Should I send them to support Captain Rex?''"
"''I'll give the order when I give it, Sergeant Appo.|Appo and Pong Krell|{{TCW|The General (episode)}}}} [[File:Appo501stUmbara-TG.png|thumb|left|300px|Sergeant Appo and the spare platoons move out to take the airbase.]] In [[20 BBY]], Appo served as a [[Clone Sergeant]] in the [[501st Legion]] by the [[time]] of the Republic [[Battle of Umbara|invasion]] of [[Umbara]]. At first he fought the Separatist-aligned [[Umbaran]]s and their [[Umbaran Militia|military]] under the leadership of [[Jedi General]] [[Anakin Skywalker]]. However, Skywalker was recalled to the Republic [[capital]] of [[Coruscant]], leaving Appo and the [[legion]] under the command of a different [[officer]], [[Besalisk]] [[Jedi]] [[General]] [[Pong Krell]], for the duration of the campaign.{{TCW|Darkness on Umbara}} Following a failed attempt to invade the [[Umbaran capital city]], Krell and the 501st were dispatched on a new assignment to secure a heavily fortified [[Umbaran airbase]] that was critical to the Republic's strategy. At the General's command, [[Clone Captain]] [[Rex]] led a vanguard assault on the base's defense perimeter while Appo and the majority of the 501st remained at Krell's side as he observed the fighting from a distance on a clifftop. Krell then ordered Appo to organize the remaining troops into [[platoon]]s, consisting of clone troopers and [[Advanced Recon Force trooper|AT-RT drivers]]. As Rex and his men were taking casualties while battling [[Umbaran mobile heavy cannon]]s, Appo informed Krell that his task of forming the platoons was complete. The [[sergeant]] also wanted to immediately send the troops to aid Rex on the battlefield, although Krell dismissed Appo, by stating he would give out the order when needed. When Rex contacted Krell via [[hologram]], Appo held the device in his hand. The Besalisk then talked to the captain, who had formulated a plan to infiltrate the airbase by using [[Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Fives]] and the trooper, [[Hardcase]]. Krell did not support the idea, Rex, nevertheless, carried out the plan. On the clifftop, both Appo and Krell witnessed the return of Fives and Hardcase, aboard two commandeered [[Zenuas 33 Umbaran starfighter]]s resulting in the destruction of the mobile cannons. Noticing the airbase's defensive systems were down, Krell ordered Appo to mobilize the spare platoons and attack the airbase. Appo's men took over it, which forced the remaining Umbaran troops stationed there to surrender. With the airbase captured, Krell and the rest of the 501st Legion fortified themselves in the base. ====A firing squad==== {{Quote|General Krell would like to see them in the tower.|Appo, to Rex about Fives and Jesse|{{TCW|Plan of Dissent}}}} [[File:Appowithprisoners-COK.png|thumb|right|300px|Two clone prisoners were escorted to the site of their execution by Sergeant Appo and his men.]] After learning of the destruction of the Confederate [[Unidentified Separatist supply ship|supply ship]] in [[orbit]] over Umbara, Krell told Appo to bring the surviving perpetrators Fives and [[Jesse]] to him in the airbase's central command tower. Appo relayed the order to Fives and Jesse and the clones met with Krell in the tower. Krell informed the two clones that because they disobeyed a direct order, they would be [[Prison|imprisoned]] for their actions and be sent to the Grand Army's [[court-martial]]. Although they were originally scheduled to be court-martialed, Krell used his authority to sentence them both to execution by firing [[squad]] due to a court-martial's lengthy trial time. Rex, with Appo, were ordered to escort Fives and Jesse to the site of their execution. As Appo stood by the [[Stuncuffs|handcuffed]] Fives and Jesse, the firing squad prepared to shoot the two clones, although their concentration was cut off after Fives pleaded for them to rethink. [[Dogma]], however, did not care for Fives' words and ordered the firing squad to fire on the two clones. Fives' words affected them, however, which caused them to misfire. Rex ordered Appo and another clone to take off Fives and Jesse's binders. However, on Krell's orders, the two clones were taken back to the airbase's prison, while Rex's men mobilized to attack Umbaran soldiers that had disguised themselves as clones. ====Carnage of Krell==== {{Quote|Captain, we've repaired the transmitter. It looks like it was sabotaged. We revieved a message from General Kenobi. His forces have captured the capital, but the remaining Umbarans are heading here.''"
"''Get everyone on the perimeter. We need to prepare for a full scale attack.''"
"''Yes, sir.''"
"''Krell sabotaged the transmitter. He's been against us since the beginning.|Appo and Rex|}} [[File:Appo-TCW-armor.png|thumb|left|220px|An arrow shaped symbol decorated Appo's Phase II helmet during the Battle of Umbara.]] Afterward, it was discovered from a [[Death|dying]] [[Clone Lieutenant]] [[Waxer]]''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia - Join the Battle!]]'' that Krell had given his [[Waxer's platoon|platoon]] from the [[212th Attack Battalion]] the same order to hunt down disguised Umbaran soldiers while deliberately knowing that the "enemy" would be actual clones. In response to the fallen Jedi's acts, Appo joined Rex and the clone troopers that went to the airbase's central tower to arrest Krell for [[treason]] against the Republic. Despite surrounding the Besalisk Jedi, Appo and the other clones were swiftly repelled by Krell with the Force before the fallen Jedi used his two duel bladed lightsabers to break through the window of the central tower and disappear into the nearby jungles. Pursuing Krell, Appo and the rest of the clones were briefly halted in their pursuit by Dogma, who was still loyal to Krell however Rex was able to quickly talk Dogma down, with the defiant clone being apprehended. Appo then followed close behind Rex and Fives as they maneuvered through the Umbaran jungles with the rest of the clones before being suddenly ambushed by Krell. Despite sustaining a number of casualties, they successfully apprehended the former Jedi. Krell then explained that he was a Separatist sympathizer, wanting to become [[Count]] [[Dooku]]'s [[Sith apprentice|apprentice]]. Krell was ultimately executed by Dogma, who was the former Jedi's most loyal follower until Krell admitted his betrayal. With Krell dead, Appo and the rest of the 501st troopers regrouped outside the prison. The Republic had won the battle. ===Promotion and Order 66=== {{Quote|What's going on here?''"
"''There's been a rebellion, sir. Don't worry. The situation is under control.|Bail Organa and CC-1119|}} In [[19 BBY]], during the last [[Standard day|days]] of the Clone Wars, the Republic was confronted with a simultaneous Separatist attack on Coruscant and a [[Mandalorian Civil War (19 BBY)|crisis]] on [[Mandalore]]. General Skywalker made the decision to divide the 501st to respond to both threats, promoting Captain Rex to serve as the Clone [[Commander]] of a new [[division]],{{TCW|Old Friends Not Forgotten}} the [[332nd Division]].''[[The Star Wars Book]]'' Appo remained in the previous force of the 501st, returning with that part of the legion to Coruscant. Despite retaining the rank of sergeant,{{HelmetCollectionCite|16|Helmets}} Appo was made the [[commanding officer]] of that half of the 501st during the journey back to the capital. [[File:Knightfall2.png|thumb|right|300px|Commander Appo was with the 501st Legion during Darth Vader's attack on the Jedi Temple of Coruscant.]] Shortly after the Republic victory on Coruscant, [[Darth Sidious]]—the [[Dark Lord of the Sith]] who orchestrated the fall of [[democracy]] in his guise as [[Supreme Chancellor]] Sheev Palpatine—activated [[Order 66]], a [[Executive Order Codes for the Grand Army of the Republic|secret protocol]] implanted through a [[behavioral modification biochip]] that forced every clone in the Grand Army to terminate the Jedi leadership.{{TCW|Orders (episode)}} With Rex still away, carrying out the order [[Skirmish aboard the Tribunal|aboard]]{{TCW|Shattered}} the ''[[Tribunal]]'', Appo held authority over the 501st troopers on Coruscant on the execution of Order 66 and was promoted to the rank of Clone Commander. Led by the newly-anointed [[Sith Lord]] [[Darth]] Vader—formerly the [[Jedi Knight]] Anakin Skywalker—Appo and the 501st participated in [[Operation: Knightfall]] and marched on the [[Imperial Palace|Jedi Grand Temple]]. Appo and his fellow troopers were not aware of Skywalker's new identity, however, and simply believed that their general was not complicit in the Jedi betrayal. The clones proceeded to [[Great Jedi Purge|slaughter]] their former allies, including [[Padawan]]s and [[Jedi Initiate|younglings]]. Appo and his men had coordinated well against the Jedi, with the element of surprise aiding their work. Within a few [[Standard hour|hours]], the Temple had been pacified and the fighting was over. [[File:Appo_Jukassa.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Padawan Zett Jukassa wounded Commander Appo while trying to escape from the Jedi Temple.]] The attack on the Jedi headquarters created a conflagration visible in the night sky of Coruscant's [[Federal District]], drawing the [[Alderaanian]] [[Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa]] to the [[Jedi temple]]. Appo, along with a contingent of clones, barred the senator from entering the facility. Repeating the idea enforced by his control chip, he claimed that the Jedi had mounted a "rebellion" which the 501st was suppressing. When Organa ignored the clone's attempt to block his path, Appo threatened the [[Politics|politician]] at the point of a [[blaster]]. However, their encounter with Organa distracted the clones from the approaching surviving Padawan [[Zett Jukassa]], who managed to kill and wound several soldiers including Appo who was struck down in the [[Limb|lower leg]] by the apprentice's [[lightsaber]]. Jukassa was ultimately killed by [[Clone Lieutenant]] [[Bow (clone trooper)|Bow]], and Organa escaped the scene in horror with [[Clone Sergeant]] [[Fox (501st Legion)|Fox]] ordering his men to let the Senator go. ===Imperial service=== Into the early weeks of the Imperial era, Appo had recovered from his wounds sustained during the attack on the Jedi Temple, with his right leg now being replaced with a prosthetic one. Appo, along with twenty other handpicked clone troopers from the 501st, including [[Clone Lieutenant]] Bow, were transferred into a small elite unit known as [[Shadow Platoon]] to accompany Darth Vader on a secret, personal mission. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I'm sorry, sir. It's time for you to leave.|CC-1119, to Bail Organa|}} Appo was a [[human]]{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} [[Gender|male]] clone of Jango Fett. As such, Appo possessed the same physical characteristics as his [[clone template]], standing at 1.83 [[meter]]s with [[Color|black]] [[hair]], brown [[eye]]s, and tan skin. [[File:Appo501st-ROTS.png|thumb|right|300px|Under the influence of Order 66, Appo threatens a sitting senator at gunpoint to leave the besieged Jedi Temple.]] For most of his life, Appo had been trained for service as a soldier of the [[Galaxy|Galactic]] Republic. He was skilled at [[Ground warfare|armed]] and [[unarmed combat]], military tactics, reconnaissance, and [[Police officer|peacekeeping]]. Like his clone brethren, he was also conditioned to be absolutely loyal to the chain of command, obeying every order without question.{{Film|II}} Though he witnessed firsthand Pong Krell's willingness to sacrifice clone lives for victory, Appo nonetheless remained loyal to his general until it was discovered that the Besalisk Jedi had betrayed the Republic. Appo's loyalty was reinforced through programming{{TBB|Aftermath (episode)}} in the form of a behavioral modification biochip, which ultimately ensured{{Databank|inhibitor-chip|Inhibitor chip}} Darth Sidious' control over clones such as Appo. Appo complied with the command to execute Order 66 as a result, participating in the attack on the Jedi Temple with Anakin Skywalker and the 501st Legion. Like other clones under the biochip's influence during Order 66,{{TCW|Shattered}} Appo believed that he was suppressing a "Jedi rebellion" against the Republic. When confronted by Bail Organa at the Jedi Temple, Appo attempted to reassure him that the 501st was in control of the situation. However, when Organa tried to gain entry to the Temple, Appo raised his weapon and ordered the senator to leave the area. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Sergeant, their defenses are down. Send in the rest of our forces. Attack the airbase.''"
"''All units, move out.|Pong Krell and Appo, exhibiting his commanding authority over 501st personnel|}} [[File:Appo-Full-Armor.png|thumb|left|210px|Commander Appo in his full Phase II clone trooper armor.]] As a clone soldier in service to the Republic, Appo was equipped with the [[Phase II clone trooper armor]] which supplanted the original [[Phase I clone trooper armor|Phase I version]] as the standard [[armor]] of the Grand Army clone troopers.{{Databank|clone-trooper-armor|Clone Trooper Armor}} His armor had the common blue markings of the 501st Legion. During his tenure as a sergeant, Appo's [[helmet]] had a white arrow shape running down its forehead.{{SW|url=series/clone-wars/the-general-trivia|text="The General" Trivia Gallery}} However, the symbol was absent from Appo's armor by the time of the Jedi Temple siege. In combat, he utilized the [[DC-15A blaster carbine]], [[DC-15A blaster rifle]] and two [[DC-17 repeater hand blaster]]s. In addition, his utility belt was equipped with a [[N-20 Baradium-core thermal detonator]].''[[Star Wars Rebels: The Visual Guide]]'' When Appo was a Clone Commander, his armor had the addition of a black and blue left-shoulder [[pauldron]], two black [[bandolier]]s with three white pouches each—one wrapped over the right shoulder to his pauldron and the other worn around the upper right arm, a black [[kama]], and dual [[holster]]s for DC-17 hand blasters. He also made use of a [[BARC speeder]] during that period. The armor customizations were not worn during Operation: Knightfall. During the early Imperial Era, Appo initially retained the distinctive 501st blue markings on his armor, as well as his blue shoulder pauldron and black kama. As the Imperial code of uniformity became stricter, Appo changed these blue markings to gray. Additionally, Appo made use of a prosthestic right leg as a result of his injury during Knightfall. ==Behind the scenes== CC-1119 first appeared in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] in both the current [[canon]] and [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuities. The film was directed by [[George Lucas]] and released in [[2005]]. CC-1119 was voiced by [[Temuera Morrison]], and like every other clone trooper in the film, portrayed entirely with computer-generated imagery.{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} The trooper was first identified as "Appo" in the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Four|fourth season]] episode "[[The General (episode)|The General]]," directed by [[Walter Murch]] and released in [[2011]]. Appo's designation "CC-1119" was first identified in his ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'' character card, released in [[2014]] by [[Konami]]. Voice actor [[Dee Bradley Baker]] provided Appo's voice in the ''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' television series, as he did for all the clone troopers in the show. The arrow on Appo's helmet is a nod to Baker voicing Appa, a character from [[W:c:avatar:Avatar: The Last Airbender|''Avatar: The Last Airbender'']], a show that ''The Clone Wars'' supervising director [[Dave Filoni]] had previously worked on. Although [[Star Wars Helmet Collection 16|''Star Wars Helmet Collection'' 16]] establishes that CC-1119 was promoted to the rank of commander upon Rex abandoning his post and Order 66 being issued, ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia - Join the Battle!]]'' establishes that CC-1119 was promoted to commander after the Battle of Umbara, and was placed in command of the unit of the 501st that traveled to Coruscant while Rex led the 332nd Division. Since ''The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia'' is the newer source, this article assumes that information takes precedence. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Appo}} *{{TCW|Darkness on Umbara}} *{{TCW|The General (episode)}} {{1stID|Appo}} *{{TCW|Plan of Dissent}} *{{TCW|Carnage of Krell}} *{{Film|III}} {{1st}} *''[[Master of Evil]]'' {{Ab|Master of Evil (audiobook)}} *''[[Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear]]'' {{Ab|Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} *{{Kenobi|Part V}} {{Flash}} *''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]'' ===Non-canon appearances=== *{{LSWCite|113|Tournament Trouble}} ==Sources== *{{SW|url=explore/the-clone-wars/ep410|text="Carnage of Krell" - ''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide|nolive=1}} *{{SW|url=series/clone-wars/the-general-episode-guide|text="The General" Episode Guide | The Clone Wars}} *{{SWE|characters|bailorgana|Bail Organa}} {{Video}} {{SourceContents|issue={{HelmetCollectionCite|16|parent=1}}|contents= *{{HelmetCollectionCite|16|Helmets}} *{{HelmetCollectionCite|16|Highlights of the Saga}} }} *{{SW|url=news/kaminos-finest-captains-and-commanders-of-the-clone-army|text=Kamino's Finest: Captains and Commanders of the Clone Army|nolive=1}} *{{ForceCollection|Clone Commander Appo|star=5}} {{1stID|CC-1119}} *{{EncyclopediaCite|Imperial Troops}} {{Po}} *''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia - Join the Battle!]]'' *{{HotToysCite|set=Television Masterpiece Series|packtype=Sixth Scale Figure|pack=#076: Commander Appo with BARC Speeder|link=collectibles/star-wars-commander-appo-with-barc-speeder-hot-toys-911126}} *{{EA|url=games/starwars/galaxy-of-heroes/news/kit-reveal-cc-1119-appo|text=Kit Reveal: CC-1119 "Appo"}} *{{Databank|appo|Appo}} *{{Databank|bail-organa|Bail Organa}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{ScrollBox|{{Reflist}}}} {{Interlang |de=CC-1119 |el=CC-1119 |es=CC-1119 |ja=CC-1119 |ka=აპო |pl=CC-1119 |tr=Appo }} [[Category:Clone trooper commanders]] [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Cyborgs with prosthetics]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the 501st Legion (Galactic Republic)]]
